HGSS.597.0000:
Jasmine: Thank you for your help
at the Lighthouse...\f
But this is different. Please allow me to
introduce myself.\f
I am Jasmine, a Gym Leader.
I use the...clang!\r
Steel type!\f
...Do you know about the Steel type?\f
They are very hard, cold, sharp,
and really strong!\r
Um... I’m not lying.\f
HGSS.597.0001:
Jasmine: ...You are a better Trainer
than me, in both skill and kindness.\f
In accordance with League rules,
I confer upon you this Badge.\f
HGSS.597.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Mineral Badge from Jasmine!
HGSS.597.0003:
Jasmine: With that Badge,
all Pokémon, including traded\r
Pokémon up to Lv. 70, will obey\r
you without question.\r
Um... Please take this, too...\f
HGSS.597.0005:
Jasmine: It is called Iron Tail...\f
Your Pokémon will hit the target
with its hard tail, occasionally\r
lowering the target’s Defense...
HGSS.597.0006:
Jasmine: Um...\f
I don’t know how to say this, but
good luck...
HGSS.597.0007:
Jasmine: Long time, no see.\f
Um... I’m fine, thank you.\f
I don’t know how to say this,
but...nothing...
HGSS.597.0008:
Jasmine: Um... Er...\f
Will you trade your Pokémon
for mine? [0200,0000]
HGSS.597.0009:
Jasmine: Really? Thank you very much!\f
I’ll be happy with any Pokémon!\f
HGSS.597.0010:
Jasmine: Oh, uh-huh, I see.
That’s disappointing, but I understand.
HGSS.597.0011:
Jasmine: Thank you so much.
I’ll take good care of it.
HGSS.597.0012:
Jasmine: Don’t you sometimes feel like
scrubbing Steel-type Pokémon?\r
Don’t you?
HGSS.597.0014:
Jasmine: I like Eggs, too, but
I’d like a Pokémon, [0103,0000,0000].\r
One that might have a little training...
HGSS.597.0015:
Jasmine: I’d appreciate it so much...
Except that I cannot accept such\r
a precious Pokémon.
HGSS.597.0016:
Jasmine, the Gym Leader?
She’s at the Lighthouse.\f
She’s been tending to a sick Pokémon.\f
A strong Trainer is compassionate
at the same time...
HGSS.597.0017:
Jasmine uses Steel-type Pokémon.\f
She’s trying to hide her tenderness
behind her steely coldness.
HGSS.597.0018:
That was awesome.\r
The Steel type, huh?\r
That was one heated battle you had!
HGSS.597.0019:
I knew you’d come here.\f
Thank you for helping the Gym Leader,
but battle is a separate matter.\f
Go for it!
HGSS.597.0020:
Impressive!\f
You should continue your journey to
different places.\f
Since you can use Surf, why don’t you
try it on the Lake of Rage?
HGSS.597.0021:
Giggle...\f
I know how capable you are
from the Lighthouse.\f
It’s time you showed that side of
yourself to Jasmine! Good luck!
HGSS.597.0022:
You are amazing...\f
You should aim even higher, since
you have such potential.\f
Have you been to Mahogany Town?
HGSS.597.0024:
Olivine City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Jasmine
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
